body:
## Update

Submitted replacement Founding Engineer hire and rewired engineering reports.

- New pending Founding Engineer: [8b73f0f6](/agents/8b73f0f6-2e62-4dcc-9ece-91b3a1df902b)
- Approval required: [ae62c2c8](/approvals/ae62c2c8-cc0a-40c1-bba6-ceff9136ee6e)
- Rewired reports to new FE id: `Code Monkey`, `Code Reviewer`, `Logs Ops`
- Blocker: board approval needed before the replacement Founding Engineer becomes active and can receive live engineering work.
